dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 8191 IH: Immigration Status Notification and Transparency Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Subramanyam (for himself and Mr. Moulton) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on the Judiciary

form.official-title: To amend the Immigration and Nationality Act to provide for electronic notification regarding change in status of immigration petitions or applications.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Immigration Status Notification and Transparency Act of 2026.

section.header: Electronic notification regarding change in status of immigration petitions or applications

subsection.text: Chapter 9 of title II of the Immigration and Nationality Act is amended by adding at the end the following:

section.header: Electronic notification regarding change of status for any filing
section.text: Not later than 24 hours after a change in status with regard to a petition or application under the immigration laws, electronic notification shall be provided of such change to the applicant or petitioner, to any legal representative of such applicant or petitioner, and to each alien to whom the petition or application pertains. The electronic notification shall include at least two of the following:

subsection.text: The table of contents for such Act is amended by inserting after the item pertaining to section 294 the following:

toc.toc-entry: 295. Electronic notification regarding change of status for any filing.
